tool.name: analyze_response
tool.description: Comprehensive HTTP response analysis for vulnerability detection. Analyzes body and headers for errors, secrets, information disclosure, tech stack, and vulnerability indicators.

parameter.name: response_body
parameter.description: HTTP response body content to analyze.

parameter.name: request_payload
parameter.description: Original request payload to check for reflection.

returns.description: Findings list with severity, tech_stack, risk_level, and recommendations.
